declarations.description: 24-hour SVG time picker web component with wheel-style hour, minute, optional second selection, Persian digit display, and configurable clock colors.
declarations.name: JBTimePickerWebComponent

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Initial time value. Accepts HH:mm, HH:mm:ss, or a JSON object string with hour, minute, and optional second.

attributes.name: second-enabled
attributes.description: Shows the second unit. Empty attribute and true mean enabled; false disables seconds.

attributes.name: frontal-zero
attributes.description: Displays values below 10 with a leading zero.

attributes.name: optional-units
attributes.description: Comma or space separated list of units displayed as optional: hour, minute, second.

attributes.name: show-persian-number
attributes.description: Displays Persian digits while keeping the value object numeric.

attributes.name: text-width
attributes.description: SVG textLength used to align time values with custom fonts.

members.name: value
members.description: Current selected time object. Programmatic updates are clamped to valid ranges and do not dispatch change.

type.text: { hour: number; minute: number; second?: number }

members.name: secondEnabled
members.description: Shows or hides the second unit.

members.name: frontalZero
members.description: Displays values below 10 with a leading zero.

members.name: showPersianNumber
members.description: Displays Persian digits in the SVG text.

members.name: textWidth
members.description: SVG textLength used to align time values with custom fonts.

members.name: focusedTimeUnit
members.description: Currently focused time unit. Prefer setTimeUnitFocus for updates.

methods.name: setTimeUnitFocus
methods.description: Focuses hour, minute, or second so its text and indicator use the active color.

events.name: change
events.description: Dispatched when the user changes a time unit. Programmatic value updates do not dispatch change.

cssParts.name: wrapper
cssParts.description: Root wrapper inside the shadow DOM.

cssParts.name: time-indicators
cssParts.description: Wrapper around hour, minute, and second indicators.

cssProperties.name: --jb-time-picker-hour-color
cssProperties.description: Focused hour text and indicator color.

cssProperties.name: --jb-time-picker-minute-color
cssProperties.description: Focused minute text and indicator color.

cssProperties.name: --jb-time-picker-second-color
cssProperties.description: Focused second text and indicator color.
